event.intent: Require enterprise context in future STEPPPS dev-actions so generated records carry capability, stakeholder, value, risk, acceptance, and operational control meaning.

pixel.display_logic: Render this development action as an inspectable JSON record with STEPPPS dimensions visible.

prompt.text: Guru observed that structurally valid STEPPPS-let files lacked useful enterprise context; add enterprise context to the dev-action contract and continuation loop.
prompt.next_genai_prompt: Continue from this STEPPPS context: Require enterprise context in future STEPPPS dev-actions so generated records carry capability, stakeholder, value, risk, acceptance, and operational control meaning. Create or update the next dev-action, preserve all seven dimensions, then verify the dev chain.

enterprise_context.business_value: Keep TBOS development auditable, restartable, and connected to the current intent: Require enterprise context in future STEPPPS dev-actions so generated records carry capability, stakeholder, value, risk, acceptance, and operational control meaning.
enterprise_context.risk: Agents may generate structurally valid but context-poor STEPPPS actions.
acceptance_criteria: The dev-action names concrete files or registry paths.
The intent explains why the change matters.
The next prompt preserves enterprise context for the next agent.
Verification proves schema and chain integrity.
